---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the listener, ingestor, dashboard, or docs
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What can't you do today that you'd like to do? Describe the use case, not the solution.

## Suggested solution

How you'd like it to work. Sketches, API shapes, or UI mockups welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Anything else you've tried, or other ways to solve the same problem.

## Scope

This feature belongs in:

- [ ] Listener (Pi-side Python)
- [ ] Cloud ingestor (Cloudflare Worker)
- [ ] Dashboard (Next.js)
- [ ] Database schema
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Contrib (vendor-specific or proprietary-protocol code that doesn't belong in core)

## Are you willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes — I'll work on this myself
- [ ] Maybe — I'd need guidance
- [ ] No — flagging for someone else to pick up
